nasb.text: And the lords of the Philistines were proceeding on by hundreds and by thousands, and David and his men were proceeding on in the rear with Achish.

esv.text: As the lords of the Philistines were passing on by hundreds and by thousands, and David and his men were passing on in the rear with Achish,

cnv.text: 非利士人的首領各率領百人或千人前進；大衛和跟隨他的人也跟在亞吉的後面前進。

ccb.text: 非利士首领统率以百人和千人为单位的士兵向前推进，大卫和他的部下跟着亚吉走在队伍的后面。
